summary: M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-FIXTURE-001 is closed after PR #239 passed both required PR Gate jobs, merged into origin/main, and the accepted low-fidelity COMPOSITE strategic terrain fixture entered main at 851d36d9192b77be15e236da386e8c01f053c22f. The next dependency-ready task is M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RENDERER-INTERACTION-001.

tests_run.result: Content validation passed before PR creation; M2 prototype manifestHash was 78cdb864.
Vitest passed 1 file / 40 tests before PR creation.

tests_run.command: cmd /c pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/sim-core-boot-boundary.test.ts
tests_run.result: Vitest passed 1 file / 3 tests before PR creation.
format:check, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture:check passed before PR creation; architecture self-test reported 15 expected violations.
PR #239 merged and local main fast-forwarded to 851d36d9192b77be15e236da386e8c01f053c22f.

decisions.decision: Mark M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-FIXTURE-001 CLOSED only after PR CI passed and origin/main contained the accepted fixture changes.
Promote M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RENDERER-INTERACTION-001 to READY because its dependency M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-FIXTURE-001 is now integrated in main.
M7 content lock remains rejected until renderer-interaction, validation, and product-owner reconsideration complete.

risks.summary: The accepted fixture is not yet a player-facing map replacement.

requested_action: Start M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RENDERER-INTERACTION-001 as the next READY M7 task.
